_meta.note: Product navigation and reflection architecture only. Not tafsir, not fatwa.

heart_wounds.title: Fear
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart gripped by what might happen, forgetting Who holds the outcome.
quranic_repair_themes: Hearts find rest in the remembrance of Allah
Allah is with those who are mindful
He is sufficient for the one who trusts Him
suggested_repair_actions: Pause and make dhikr for two minutes
Make one small lawful effort, then release the outcome
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, calm my heart and let me trust You with what I cannot control.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use. Not therapy; in a mental-health crisis seek professional help.

heart_wounds.title: Despair
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart that has stopped expecting good from Allah.
possible_false_beliefs: It is too late for me
Allah has given up on me
quranic_repair_themes: Do not despair of the mercy of Allah
With hardship comes ease
Allah does not waste the reward of the patient
suggested_repair_actions: Name one next small step and take only that
Recall one past relief Allah sent you
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, restore my hope in You and carry me through this.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use. Not therapy; in a mental-health crisis seek professional help.

heart_wounds.title: Jealousy
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart that measures itself against others and resents their blessings.
quranic_repair_themes: Provision is apportioned by Allah
Gratitude increases blessing
Seek refuge from the harm of envy
suggested_repair_actions: Make sincere dua for someone you envy
Write three blessings you have stopped noticing
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, bless them and content my heart with what You have given me.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

heart_wounds.title: Arrogance
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart that forgets its smallness before Allah and looks down on others.
quranic_repair_themes: Do not walk on the earth in arrogance
All honour belongs to Allah
Humility before the Most High
suggested_repair_actions: Do one quiet act of service today
Acknowledge one person's good and thank them
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, clothe my heart in humility and free me from pride.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

heart_wounds.title: Heedlessness (ghaflah)
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart distracted from Allah, drifting through the day unaware.
possible_false_beliefs: This life is all there is
quranic_repair_themes: In the remembrance of Allah hearts find rest
Allah is nearer than the jugular vein
Reflect on the signs of Allah
suggested_repair_actions: Anchor one moment of dhikr before each prayer
Pause once today to reflect on one blessing
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, awaken my heart and keep me mindful of You.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

heart_wounds.title: Guilt
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart weighed down by what it has done, unsure it can return.
possible_false_beliefs: There is no point trying again
quranic_repair_themes: Allah forgives all sins
Turn to Allah in sincere repentance
Good deeds erase misdeeds
suggested_repair_actions: Make sincere tawbah for one thing, then do one good deed
Remove one trigger for 24 hours
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, forgive me and make my repentance sincere and lasting.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

heart_wounds.title: Anger
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart quick to flare, harming those closest before it cools.
possible_false_beliefs: I have a right to lash out
quranic_repair_themes: The strong restrain themselves
Respond to harm with what is better
Gentleness and forgiveness
suggested_repair_actions: Pause and seek refuge before reacting
Speak to one person with deliberate gentleness today
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, cool my anger and make me gentle with those I love.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

heart_wounds.title: Attachment to dunya
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart that clings to this world as if it were lasting.
possible_false_beliefs: My worth is what I own
quranic_repair_themes: This world's adornment versus the lasting good
Wealth and children are a trial
Barakah over abundance
suggested_repair_actions: Give one thing away quietly today
Pause one status purchase and sit with 'enough'
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, put this world in my hands and not in my heart.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

heart_wounds.title: Fear of poverty
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart that believes its security rests in money, not in Ar-Razzaq.
possible_false_beliefs: My rizq is in people's hands
I must compromise my deen to survive
quranic_repair_themes: Provision is upon Allah
A way out and provision for the mindful
Effort with trust, not panic
suggested_repair_actions: Make one honest, halal effort and release the outcome
Give a small sadaqah despite the fear
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, You are Ar-Razzaq; free my heart from the fear of want.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use. Not financial advice; for serious debt seek qualified professionals.

heart_wounds.title: Lack of discipline
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart of good intentions that struggles to follow through.
quranic_repair_themes: The four things that save from loss
Steadfast deeds, even if small
Night prayer and inner strength
suggested_repair_actions: Choose one small consistent act for today only
Audit one hour and redirect it to good
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, bless my time and make me steadfast in small good deeds.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

heart_wounds.title: Family hurt
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart carrying wounds and resentment from those closest to it.
possible_false_beliefs: I must accept all harm in the name of patience
quranic_repair_themes: Kindness to parents and kin
Justice carried with mercy
Patience does not mean accepting abuse
suggested_repair_actions: Take one step toward a healthy boundary or repair
Make dua for the one who hurt you
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, heal my heart, guide my family, and let me respond with mercy and wisdom.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use. Never a counsel to accept abuse; seek qualified support where there is harm.

heart_wounds.title: Loss of purpose
heart_wounds.short_description: A heart that has forgotten why it is here.
possible_false_beliefs: I am only here to consume
It is too late to matter
quranic_repair_themes: Created to worship and know Allah
Life and death as a test of best deeds
The honour and trust given to the human
suggested_repair_actions: Do one ordinary task today purely for Allah
Name one way you can benefit someone
heart_wounds.dua_prompt: O Allah, let my life be spent in what pleases You and gives it meaning.
heart_wounds.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use.

prompts: What lie do I believe in that moment?
What halal replacement action can I take?
Which reminder brings me back to hope?
Who can help me stay accountable?
sin_cycle_breaker.caution_note: Suggested reflection only — not tafsir, not fatwa. Requires source checks and qualified scholar review before public use. If a pattern is compulsive or addictive, seek qualified professional support.

consistency_model.label: 1-day reset
consistency_model.description: Return today: one honest restart, no self-condemnation.

consistency_model.label: 3-day awareness
consistency_model.description: Three days of noticing the trigger and the lie before acting.

consistency_model.label: 7-day repair
consistency_model.description: A week of one small daily action toward the opposite virtue.

consistency_model.label: 30-day transformation
consistency_model.description: A month of consistency, letting a new habit settle in the heart.
